creator: john@jmarshall.id.au
text:
As noted in the initial PR, I also sent a patch upstream. That issue was logged upstream as [issue1510]. The patch was applied to GnuGP 2.0 in commit 110b52f and was included in the 2.0.21 release.

Sorry for not remembering to update the PR following the upstream fix.

Thank you for maintaining this port.
